focalElement: ornate obsidian-and-gold altar with Demon King silhouette carved into the back wall
secondaryElement: purple-amethyst flame pillars, jagged Embertide fragment at apex, skulls and shattered Emberblade hilt at base
notes: Bespoke raster for the Vurmox DESTINY slot — NOT a shared altar frame.

Rendered at 1536×2304 for high-DPR clarity. The destiny pane was formerly rendered at 1.5× CSS scale (u-9d) but the 2026-04-22 Round 2 polish reverted that to 1× to stop the pane from overflowing the altar row; the raster still scales down cleanly at the 1× footprint.
Cutout overlay: outer ~25% frame opaque, inner arch silhouette fully transparent (alpha 0) so the stained-glass pane shows through.

Raster was generated via fal-ai/nano-banana-pro at 3:4 aspect, 2K resolution, then chroma-keyed to alpha via BFS flood-fill on the model's checkerboard transparency indicator (tol=45 catches both shades of the grey checkerboard).

A soft gold aura CSS overlay (radial gradient, 4s opacity pulse) animates ON TOP of this raster but BELOW the boss portrait/name/HP children — see `[data-variant="destiny"]` rules in BossAltarPane.css. (Earlier iterations used a 9s-12s conic+mask spin mandala; it was replaced in Round 2 polish because the rotation flickered against the raster's soft-alpha rim.)
